summary: Verified all 5 requested fixes via code review and UI testing: 1) thinSigns utility for sign clutter prevention, 2) Search results ordering (search ABOVE recommendations), 3) START NAV gold button in RouteComparisonPanel, 4) User icon spin fix with compass mode sync and 5° dead zone, 5) Route overview button in MapControls. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis. Non-blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: thinSigns utility at NavigationView.tsx:4422-4434 - filters signs by minimum distance and max count
VERIFIED: thinSigns applied to placeHighwayShields (max 30), placeExitSigns (max 25), placeCurveSigns (max 20), placeSpeedLimitSigns (max 20), placeCmvWarnings (max 20)
VERIFIED: Search results ordering at NavigationView.tsx:1865 - finalResults = [...uniqueResults.slice(0, 10), ...nearby] puts search results FIRST
VERIFIED: UI dropdown shows 'SEARCH RESULTS' header above 'Nearby Recommendations' header (lines 6649-6653)
VERIFIED: RouteComparisonPanel.tsx:51-58 - START NAV button with data-testid='route-comparison-start-nav', gold #D4AF37 background, black text, Zap icon
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx:656 - smoothedHeadingRef.current = bearing syncs heading before setting --vehicle-rotation in compass mode
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx:5072 - EXIT comment 'compass mode exclusively controls icon + map rotation'
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx:5126 - Dead zone is 5 degrees (Math.abs(normalizedDiff) < 5)
VERIFIED: index.css:39-42 - .vehicle-pointer has transition: transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)
VERIFIED: MapControls.tsx:2 - Maximize2 imported from lucide-react
VERIFIED: MapControls.tsx:40-41 - onRouteOverview and hasActiveRoute props added
VERIFIED: MapControls.tsx:352-360 - Route overview button with data-testid='route-overview-btn', conditionally rendered when hasActiveRoute
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx:6986-6998 - MapControls receives hasActiveRoute={routePoints.length > 1} and onRouteOverview callback with H.geo.Rect bounds

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 5 fixes verified via code review and UI testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 requested fixes verified: 1) thinSigns utility prevents sign clutter on long routes with max counts (shields=30, exits=25, curves=20, speed=20, cmv=20), 2) Search results appear ABOVE nearby recommendations in dropdown, 3) START NAV button is gold #D4AF37 with black text and Zap icon, 4) User icon spin fixed with compass mode sync and 5° dead zone, 5) Route overview button appears in MapControls when route is active. Guest login works. Route comparison panel shows correctly with multiple route options.

sign_clutter_fix.details: thinSigns utility at line 4422 filters signs by minimum distance spacing and max count. Applied to all sign placement functions with correct limits.

search_results_ordering.details: finalResults = [...uniqueResults.slice(0, 10), ...nearby] at line 1865 puts search results FIRST. UI shows 'SEARCH RESULTS' header above 'Nearby Recommendations'.

start_nav_button.details: RouteComparisonPanel has gold START NAV button with data-testid='route-comparison-start-nav', bg-[#D4AF37], black text, Zap icon, uppercase tracking.

user_icon_spin_fix.details: Compass handler syncs smoothedHeadingRef.current = bearing before setting --vehicle-rotation. Telemetry loop has EXIT guard for compass mode. Dead zone is 5 degrees. CSS transition is 0.8s cubic-bezier.

route_overview_button.details: MapControls has Maximize2 import, onRouteOverview and hasActiveRoute props, button with data-testid='route-overview-btn' conditionally rendered. NavigationView passes hasActiveRoute={routePoints.length > 1} and onRouteOverview callback.

guest_login.details: Guest login works. App loads to COMMAND CENTER dashboard, then Navigation view with map.

route_calculation.details: Route calculation works. Route comparison panel shows with multiple route options (PRIMARY, ALT 1, ALT 2) with time, distance, and cost estimates.

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live
